_comment: Per-layer metadata for GRID3 PMTiles archives. Keys match layer names in LAYER_GROUPS (tippecanoe.py). Embedded into each -L JSON spec's 'description' field by build_tippecanoe_group_command(), which surfaces as vector_layers[].description in the output tileset. Centroid layers inherit their parent polygon's DOI/license.
